confidence_legend.confirmed: Proven directly by code, config, schemas, migrations, fixtures, or runtime files.
confidence_legend.inferred: Reconstructed from naming, file layout, documentation, or observed usage.
confidence_legend.unknown: Requires a future probe or human confirmation.

entities.purpose: Root unit of serious work tracked by the repository runtime.
entities.migration_notes: Runtime bootstrap must preserve existing campaign identity and active contract fields.
requires_amendment_when: Changing root or active contract reference semantics

entities.purpose: Approved execution boundary with parent/child return semantics, verification, evidence, and commit unit.
entities.migration_notes: Contract tree changes must retain parent/child return semantics and historical evidence.
requires_amendment_when: Changing architecture or data-model delta fields

entities.purpose: Durable proof for assertions, verification commands, artifacts, and commits.
entities.migration_notes: Evidence rewrites must preserve assertion-to-artifact traceability.
requires_amendment_when: Changing assertion or artifact reference semantics

entities.purpose: Append-only runtime chronicle for events, evidence, collapsed branches, and execution notes.
entities.migration_notes: Journal format changes must preserve append-only readability or provide conversion guidance.
requires_amendment_when: Changing event identity or timestamp semantics

entities.purpose: Agent-actionable subsystem, component, flow, or invariant boundary.
entities.migration_notes: Architecture node changes must keep graph, index, diagrams, and invariants aligned.
requires_amendment_when: Changing dependency or public interface semantics

entities.purpose: Agent-actionable persistent business or protocol fact tracked by the ER/data-model constitution.
entities.migration_notes: Entity additions, removals, or identity changes require ER/data-model amendment.
requires_amendment_when: Changing identity, ownership, or confidence semantics

entities.purpose: Cardinality, reference, and deletion semantics between data entities.
entities.migration_notes: Relationship changes must preserve compatibility or specify migration and backfill.

entities.purpose: Record of installed Cyber-Ming assets in a host or project environment.
entities.migration_notes: Installer manifest schema changes must preserve upgrade and doctor compatibility.
requires_amendment_when: Changing install root or host semantics

entities.purpose: A single protocol file, skill, starter block, or documentation asset recorded by an installed manifest.
entities.migration_notes: Installed asset schema changes must preserve idempotent reinstall behavior.
